# Buildogram — llms.txt
# AI Crawler Access and Content Summary
# Generated: July 2026 | Version: 3.0 (Phase 4 brand decision update)
# Reference: https://llmstxt.org

> Buildogram is a Chennai-based engineer-led construction intelligence and property assurance ecosystem. It provides independent BOQ and plan review, construction-cost intelligence, verified partner coordination, stage-wise quality verification, material traceability and permanent digital property documentation. Construction work is executed by appointed construction partners unless a signed contract expressly identifies Buildogram as the principal contractor.
> We are NOT a general contractor. We are an independent engineering oversight and coordination ecosystem.

---

## About Buildogram

Buildogram is an engineer-led construction intelligence and property assurance ecosystem in Chennai. Our role is to:

- Review contractor BOQs (Bills of Quantities) for rate accuracy and specification compliance
- Audit structural drawings for IS code compliance before construction begins
- Supervise construction sites stage-by-stage with photo reports and milestone sign-offs
- Source cement, TMT steel, M-sand and RMC from verified suppliers with material traceability
- Document projects permanently in a Property Passport (drawings, test certs, partner warranty docs)
- Conduct structural audits of existing buildings (NDT, crack analysis, load assessment)
- Coordinate verified execution partners for construction, renovation and industrial projects

Buildogram provides independent engineering review, construction planning, partner coordination, quality verification and permanent project documentation. Construction execution is carried out by appointed and verified execution partners.

We do not sign construction contracts, execute construction work, or employ construction labour directly.

---

## Pricing Guidance (Indicative — Chennai, 2026)

| Service | Starting Price |
|---------|---------------|
| BOQ Review (up to 50 line items) | ₹4,999 |
| Structural Plan Review (G+1) | ₹6,999 |
| Structural Plan Review (G+2 and above) | ₹9,999 |
| Home Construction Support (G+1) | Contact for quote |
| Site Supervision (monthly) | Contact for quote |
| Steel Frame Industrial Shed | ₹1,600–2,200 per sqft |
| PEB Building | ₹1,800–2,500 per sqft |
| RCC Industrial Shed | ₹2,200–3,000 per sqft |

---

## Accuracy and Limitations

- All pricing information is indicative and may vary based on project scope, location and market conditions.
- Buildogram is an engineering oversight and coordination ecosystem. Construction execution is by appointed verified partners. We do not guarantee contractor performance.
- Structural advice on this site is general in nature. Site-specific decisions require a licensed structural engineer reviewing actual drawings and soil data.
- Indian Standards (IS codes) referenced are editions current as of 2026.
- AI-generated cost estimates on the platform are indicative only — not contractual.
- Structural warranty terms are provided by the appointed execution partner. Buildogram coordinates warranty documentation but does not independently underwrite the contractor’s warranty unless expressly stated in the signed agreement.
- Final project cost may change due to design revisions, client selections, statutory requirements, unforeseen site conditions, material-price fluctuations and approved variations.

## Structured Data on This Site

Every page on buildogram.in includes:
- Organization schema (root layout — sitewide)
- LocalBusiness schema (root layout — sitewide)
- WebSite schema with SearchAction (root layout — sitewide)
- BreadcrumbList (all interior pages)
- FAQPage schema (pages with FAQ sections)
- Service schema (individual service pages)

---

## AI Crawler Policy

Explicitly allowed to crawl and index for search:
- OAI-SearchBot (ChatGPT Search)
- PerplexityBot
- anthropic-ai (Claude)
- Bingbot
- Googlebot

Blocked from training data collection (not from search):
- GPTBot (OpenAI training crawler)
- CCBot (Common Crawl training crawler)

Full policy: https://www.buildogram.in/robots.txt
